data.title: Questions? We've got answers.
data.subtitle: Learn more about Static Website Generator, Astro themes and the JSON-first workflow.

items.question: What is Static Website Generator?
items.answer: Static Website Generator is a content management system that exports structured JSON. Astro themes render that JSON into fast and secure static websites.

items.question: Do I need to know Astro?
items.answer: No. Content editors work entirely inside SWG. Developers can create or customize Astro themes using familiar Astro components.

items.question: How is content stored?
items.answer: Content is exported as structured JSON files inside the export/ directory. This directory becomes the single source of truth for the Astro theme.

items.question: Can I create my own themes?
items.answer: Yes. SWG includes a starter theme and a CLI to help you build, validate and package reusable Astro themes.

items.question: Is SWG suitable for production websites?
items.answer: Absolutely. Generated websites are static, lightweight, secure and optimized for performance, SEO and modern hosting platforms.

data.title: Build your next static website with SWG.
